critical_issues.title: Acceptance criteria were validated from a repository file instead of live production systems
critical_issues.recommendation: Add live checks for GitHub Actions run result, production blob existence, and production alert-rule activation when integration environment variables are provided.

suggestions.title: Checklist and release-notes tests only checked phrase presence
suggestions.recommendation: Validate completion status via integration checks (checked checklist boxes in release notes).

suggestions.title: Evidence template test did not parse JSON or validate field types
suggestions.recommendation: Parse JSON with json.loads and assert required schema field types.
